title: pgstat — Database & Tables Overview
description: Fleet genelinde en aktif DB'ler ve tablolar (cross-instance). En cok yazma/okuma yapan, deadlock/conflict yasayan instance+DB. Click → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: select count(distinct (d.instance_pk, d.dbid)) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where d.sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.conflicts_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.deadlocks_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.temp_files_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

panels.title: Top 30 Database (cross-instance, range içi)
panels.description: Fleet'teki en aktif DB'ler. Hangi instance'da hangi DB'de ne kadar yük var.

targets.rawSql: select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, d.datname as database, sum(d.xact_commit_delta) as commits, sum(d.xact_rollback_delta) as rollbacks, sum(d.tup_inserted_delta) as inserts, sum(d.tup_updated_delta) as updates, sum(d.tup_deleted_delta) as deletes, sum(d.blks_read_delta) * 8192 as disk_read, round(100.0 * sum(d.blks_hit_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.blks_hit_delta + d.blks_read_delta), 0), 1) as cache_hit_pct, sum(d.temp_bytes_delta) as temp_bytes, sum(d.deadlocks_delta) as deadlocks, sum(d.conflicts_delta) as conflicts from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by i.instance_pk, i.display_name, d.datname order by commits desc nulls last limit 30

panels.title: Top 50 Tablo — En Çok Yazma (cross-instance, range içi)
panels.description: Fleet'teki en aktif yazılan tablolar. instance × tablo kombinasyonu.

targets.rawSql: select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, t.schemaname || '.' || t.relname as relation, sum(t.n_tup_ins_delta) as inserts, sum(t.n_tup_upd_delta) as updates, sum(t.n_tup_del_delta) as deletes, sum(t.n_tup_hot_upd_delta) as hot_updates, sum(t.seq_scan_delta) as seq_scans, sum(t.idx_scan_delta) as idx_scans from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(t.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by i.instance_pk, i.display_name, t.schemaname, t.relname having sum(t.n_tup_ins_delta + t.n_tup_upd_delta + t.n_tup_del_delta) > 0 order by sum(t.n_tup_ins_delta + t.n_tup_upd_delta + t.n_tup_del_delta) desc nulls last limit 50
